title: enqueue TOCTOU: concurrent callers both see count<1000 and both insert, exceeding cap
description: store.rs enqueue() uses BEGIN DEFERRED. Two concurrent callers both read count=999, both pass the check, both insert — leaving 1001 messages. The 1000-message flood cap is not enforced. add_group_member_capped documents BEGIN IMMEDIATE as the fix for the same pattern; enqueue() has the same flaw.
